fault_hypothesis: The loop condition on line 56 should be `len(order) >= capacity` instead of `len(order) > capacity`. The current condition fails to evict entries when the cache size is exactly at capacity, violating the requirement to keep the size strictly under capacity.

constraints.intent: The loop must terminate only when the number of entries is strictly under capacity.
Capacity must be a non-negative integer after validation.
After the eviction loop, the number of entries must be strictly under capacity.
